title: Reading and Use of English - Part 4
description: For questions 25 – 30, complete the second sentence so that it has a similar meaning to the first sentence, using the word given. Do not change the word given. You must use between two and five words, including the word given. Here is an example (0).

example.firstSentence: They have never performed this symphony before.
example.secondSentence: This is (1) _________ this symphony has been performed.

questions.firstSentence: Somebody is cleaning the windows right now.
I'm certain they didn't break the rules.
He said, 'I haven't seen you for ages.'
She postponed the meeting until Friday.
This is the most delicious meal I have ever tasted.
questions.secondSentence: I have (1) _________ such a delicious meal.

questions.firstSentence: He started learning to drive six months ago.
questions.secondSentence: He has been learning to drive (1) _________ months.
